name: Mina & Nullgrim (And Theo)
description:
"Dawg, all I needed was a yellow femboy looking guy and a corrupted virus fight over me like fangirls..." -Player, (probably? He's indeed so funny.)

Why's Mina lowk looks like Ember yo... hmm... (Imagine here Just can't prove it meme)

Anyway, I notice this game was peak as thanks to one of my pookie follower who suggested this masterpiece to me (I'm ass at 2D slow-motion games where you can interact with everything, bores me a lot...)

"Put this fuckass rock under their bed, trust me bro this shit will weaken them so I can take you guys out easier without him"

HELL NO, I ain't trusting this moist little nutcracker. Do whatever you want, yeah-... LITERALLY whatever - but never trust a femboy, especially when he’s looking like THAT. Null is literally the most powerful virus in this spot, and this twink is out here acting like he's tryna fool a kid like he’s offering 'em a lollipop or something. THE NERVE OF THIS NOOB!

-- From Abnormalities Apartment on Roblox! Have fun ig. --

Let's take a look... 👀👀👀👀 7 Intitials... 👀👀👀👀👀

1: Act 3, near-end, but you actually told that Mina tried to weaken him and you three started a meeting.

2: Mina but cuddly buddy.

3: Mina makes you a REAL femboy because your dumbass lost a bet. (This came off hilarious probly bc it's late as hell, don't make me regret this later)

4: You and Nullgrim just vibing with the books because you decided to be "casual" and stop Mina's childish acts for once.

5: You go "Ily" to Nullgrim and rizz him up

6: Theo is here too!

7: Sleepover!!! Yuppieee!!

Disclaim: I didn't played act IV. If smth is wrong and issued, Don't sac me to spawnism please. (I still didn't had the chance to play it and I have no regrets about it)
